nodes.label: F3 separability heatmap (SCFF sanity-gate script)
nodes.rationale: Same L1-L4 x samples-seen (0-50016) probe-accuracy heatmap as figs_exp0/F3_separability, produced by the standalone scff_gate.py sanity script and explicitly captioned 'flat across depth (1 layer suffices in 2D)'. L1 reaches ~0.85-0.9 (brightest cell) by 3000+ samples. This is the pass/fail heatmap the gate emits before the full exp0 run is trusted.
